scripts.build: bun run --filter @automation/shared build && bun run --filter @automation/api build && bun run --filter @automation/worker build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @automation/shared test && bun run --filter @automation/api test && bun run --filter @automation/worker test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @automation/shared build && bun run --filter @automation/api typecheck && bun run --filter @automation/worker typecheck
